dc:title: Touring bicycle beside a rural road in a hilly landscape
dc:description: A loaded touring bicycle stands at the left edge of a two-lane paved road, leaning against a metal guardrail beside a concrete retaining wall. The bicycle is fitted with rear panniers and other travel gear. The road recedes toward a central vanishing point, with white edge and lane markings visible on the asphalt surface. Dry grasses, shrubs, and trees border both sides of the roadway. In the distance, low hills or mountains extend across the horizon under a mostly clear sky. No people are visible.
condition_note: Colors unverified; image programmatically inverted from faded source negative.
